meaning: n.(印度教、佛教中的)禅(音译"禅那"之略 意译"静虑"、"思维修"、"弃恶"、"功德丛林"等)
examples: Besides, it led to the formation of the "comparing poems to Dhyana" habit.
Then come pratyahara, dahrana, dhyana and samadhi, which are the final four.
The integration of Dhyana and Wushu embodies their internal congruity and interaction between them.
